[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010110000 3
1 100000100 2
2 011001000 3
3 000110000 2
4 100000000 1
5 010101010 4
6 001000101 3
7 110111001 6

01 10 010110000 3 match 0
12 21 000000010 1
23 32 001001010 3
34 43 000110010 3
45 54 100000011 3
56 65 011001011 5
67 76 001000101 3 match 6
70 07 000000001 1

02 20 100001000 2
13 31 010110010 4
24 42 100000010 2
35 53 011001010 4
46 64 000100011 3
57 75 001000001 2
60 06 010101001 4
71 17 000000000 a

14 41 000110010 3
25 52 101001010 4
36 63 011101010 5
47 74 000000001 1
50 05 110001001 4
61 16 010100010 3
72 27 001000100 2

15 51 010000010 2
26 62 001001110 4
37 73 001000000 1
